title: cyclosorus hamiferus
intro: Cyclosorus hamiferus, also known as the hairy fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus hamiferus include treating fever, headache, and other ailments, as well as using it as a diuretic and to lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves can also be used in traditional medicine preparations.
